title: SimmVersion
description: A class to specify the ISDA SIMM version that applies to the ISDA 2018 CSA for Initial Margin.

isSpecified.description: A boolean attribute to determine whether the SIMM version is specified for the purpose of the legal agreement.

partyVersion.description: The party which the specified SIMM version applies to.

asSpecified.description: The SIMM version exception when specified as a customized approach by the party.
